rationale: The "POV: rushed home to play" live-action hook is a generic hypercasual UA template that broadly overlaps Flappy Dunk's casual audience, but the frictions are significant: the reference creative explicitly names a competitor (Tetris Block Party) and uses a purple/gold palette that clashes with Flappy Dunk's beige/magenta/blue cartoon look, requiring a full reshoot rather than a swap. Mechanic fit is weak because a bedroom POV doesn't showcase the tap-timing hoop gameplay or the VS competitive angle that differentiates this title—if adapted, lead with a split-screen "me vs friend" reveal after the bed jump to salvage the head-to-head core loop. Recommend testing only as a low-budget probe, not a scaled bet.
